titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ahmad Ibn Muhammad Ibn ʿisa Al-Ashari

text: و ما كان فيه عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى الأشعريّ- رضي اللّه عنه- فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ جميعا عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى الأشعريّ‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: And whatever is narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa Al-Ashari - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah and Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari together, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa Al-Ashari.
